Thanks for contributing to dopa! Please read CONTRIBUTING.md first.
For large or behavior-changing work, open an issue to discuss before submitting.
-->

## Summary

Briefly describe what this PR does and why.

## Related issue

<!-- e.g. Closes #123 -->
Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that changes existing behavior)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Chore / tooling / refactor

## Testing done

Describe how you verified the change. Include the commands you ran (see README) and the
result — e.g. `python -m sensors.daemon --once`, unit tests, or a manual `/dopa` run.

```
<paste relevant test output here>
```

## Privacy impact

dopa is local-first and privacy-first by default.

- [ ] This change does not collect or transmit any new data, **or**
- [ ] New data handling is documented and any off-device transmission is opt-in (off by default).

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] My changes are focused and scoped to a single concern.
- [ ] I ran the project's build/tests locally and they pass.
- [ ] I updated docs where relevant (docs updated).
- [ ] I did not commit profiles, webcam data, or `~/.dopa` contents.
- [ ] I signed off my commits (DCO) with `git commit -s`.
